rationale: Codebase-pin lens, re-verified at 07eb467e against the round-2->3 changed pins. (1) Bead-unique doc targets: all eight domain-doc files the work_chunks now name exist as real files at this SHA — workflow/{architecture,overview,interfaces,runbook}.md, core/{architecture,overview}.md, execution/architecture.md, context-system/architecture.md. (2) No cross-bead sharing: uniq -d over every work_chunks key_file_path is empty, and the per-chunk domain-doc assignment is disjoint (B1 the four *architecture.md; B2 workflow/overview; B3 workflow/interfaces + core/overview; B4 workflow/runbook), matching the R6 fix. (3) Rewritten Verification commands reference real targets: codex.go/spec_init.go/spec.go/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md all present; internal/complete (8), internal/phase (7), internal/setup (9), cmd/mindspec (61) all carry Go sources; specCreateCmd lives in spec.go for the B4 reuse. (4) Falsifiability intact: all six net-new test names are ABSENT at this SHA, so the PASS-line checks fail if a bead omits them; inverted-grep targets are real occurrences (codex.go os.WriteFile/OpenFile at 68/79/96, spec_init.go spec.Run at 33 with no RunE-reuse yet, phase.FindActiveBeadForEpic at derive.go:713, and the SpecIsApproved/IsDomainCoveredCtx dangling comments at instruct.go:102 and plan.go:628). No pin miss; approval holds.

findings.location: plan.md work_chunks key_file_paths (round-2 R6 bead-unique doc targets)
findings.note: ADDRESSED. Every domain-doc pin resolves to a real file at 07eb467e and no doc path is shared across chunks (uniq -d over all key_file_paths is empty). Per-bead assignment is disjoint and ownership-aligned: B1 -> workflow/execution/core/context-system architecture.md, B2 -> workflow/overview.md, B3 -> workflow/interfaces.md + core/overview.md, B4 -> workflow/runbook.md.

findings.location: plan.md Bead 1-4 Verification (rewritten PASS-line + inverted-grep commands)
findings.note: ADDRESSED. Commands reference real files/packages/tests: the six net-new tests are absent at this SHA (so PASS-line checks are falsifiable), and inverted-grep targets are live occurrences (codex.go 68/79/96, spec_init.go:33 spec.Run with no specCreateCmd.RunE yet, derive.go:713 FindActiveBeadForEpic, instruct.go:102 + plan.go:628 dangling comments). All named packages carry Go sources.
